data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

## Testing Mode
GREEN

AC added via sprint orchestrator (original ticket had no AC section).

Scripts to flatten: validate-review-output.sh (max nesting 7), merge-to-main.sh (max nesting 6), validate.sh (max nesting 6), worktree-cleanup.sh (~92-line sections), sprint-next-batch.sh (~75-line sections).

Approach: use guard clauses (early returns) and extract deeply-nested blocks into named functions.

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] validate-review-output.sh nesting depth does not exceed 6 levels (24 spaces)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "
import re
with open('plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh') as f:
    max_depth = max((len(line) - len(line.lstrip())) // 4 for line in f if line.strip())
print(f'Max nesting: {max_depth}')
assert max_depth <= 6, f'Too deep: {max_depth}'
"
- [ ] merge-to-main.sh nesting depth does not exceed 6 levels
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "
with open('plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh') as f:
    max_depth = max((len(line) - len(line.lstrip())) // 4 for line in f if line.strip())
print(f'Max nesting: {max_depth}')
assert max_depth <= 6, f'Too deep: {max_depth}'
"
- [ ] validate.sh nesting depth does not exceed 6 levels
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "
with open('plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh') as f:
    max_depth = max((len(line) - len(line.lstrip())) // 4 for line in f if line.strip())
print(f'Max nesting: {max_depth}')
assert max_depth <= 6, f'Too deep: {max_depth}'
"
- [ ] All modified scripts remain syntactically valid
  Verify: for f in $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh; do bash -n "$f" && echo "OK: $f"; done
